title: Start of School Information
metaDescription: Everything Rosehill College students need for the start of the year — term dates, daily times, buses, uniform, stationery and BYOD.

sections.heading: Start of school information
sections.lede: We look forward to welcoming all students back to school in February 2026, and a special welcome to all our new students. Everything whānau need for the first days of the year is here — start dates, daily times, downloads and stationery lists.

sections.heading: Start dates 2026
sections.lede: All Year 9 students and those new to Rosehill College will start on Monday 2 February. All other students will begin on Tuesday 3 February. Each group of students is expected to attend school for the whole time on their allocated day.
sections.caption: Start of year dates and times 2026
rows:
8:30am – 3:10pm
Buses will be operating. New students who are not Year 9s may leave at 12:50pm.

items.text: Classes begin at 8:50am, so please ensure your child arrives with time to be in their classroom by the beginning of the school day. Tuesday starts later, with no Period 1.
Buses commence their normal runs from the morning of Monday 2 February and pick students up from college at 3:20pm.
Your student's 2026 Manaakitia Mai group is on the emailed version of the start-of-year letter — students need to know this for their first day at school.
Please arrange to meet your child off site after school. Buses and hundreds of students on foot use the front entrance, so cars cannot come in at pick-up time.

docs.label: Start of Year Letter to Parents 2026

sections.heading: Stationery lists 2026
sections.lede: You may order your stationery online at Officemax Ordering.

sections.heading: Keep us up to date
sections.text: If any of your details have changed — email address, phone numbers, home address or caregiver and emergency information — please email studentadmin@rosehillcollege.school.nz.
